question: How to add form validation in HTML
description: Use HTML5 constraint attributes to validate user input before submission — no JavaScript required for common cases like required fields, email formats, and length limits.

steps.title: Mark required fields
steps.explanation: The required attribute prevents form submission if the field is empty. Pair it with <label> and aria-describedby so screen readers communicate what's needed.

steps.title: Use semantic input types
steps.explanation: Semantic types (email, url, tel, number, date) trigger browser-level validation automatically and show the right keyboard on mobile. They require no extra code.
steps.code:
<input type="email" name="email" required />
<input type="url" name="website" placeholder="https://" />
<input type="tel" name="phone" />
<input type="number" name="age" min="18" max="120" />
<input type="date" name="dob" />

steps.title: Enforce patterns with regex
steps.explanation: The pattern attribute accepts a JavaScript regex. The title is shown in the browser's validation tooltip and should describe the expected format.
steps.code:
<!-- UK postcode -->
<input
  type="text"
  name="postcode"
  pattern="[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][0-9A-Z]? [0-9][A-Z]{2}"
  title="Enter a valid UK postcode, e.g. SW1A 1AA"
  required
/>

<!-- Password: 8+ chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit -->
<input
  type="password"
  name="password"
  pattern="(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d).{8,}"
  title="Minimum 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one digit"
  required
/>

steps.title: Set length and range limits
steps.explanation: Use minlength/maxlength for text and min/max/step for numbers. The step attribute controls the increment for number and range inputs.
steps.code:
<input
  type="text"
  name="username"
  minlength="3"
  maxlength="20"
  required
/>

<input
  type="number"
  name="quantity"
  min="1"
  max="99"
  step="1"
  value="1"
/>

<input
  type="range"
  name="rating"
  min="1"
  max="10"
  step="1"
  value="5"
/>

full_example.code:
<form action="/register" method="post" novalidate id="regForm">
  <fieldset>
    <legend>Create account</legend>

    <label for="name">Full name *</label>
    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required minlength="2" maxlength="60" autocomplete="name" />

    <label for="regEmail">Email address *</label>
    <input type="email" id="regEmail" name="email" required autocomplete="email" />

    <label for="pwd">Password *</label>
    <input
      type="password"
      id="pwd"
      name="password"
      required
      minlength="8"
      pattern="(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d).{8,}"
      title="At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number"
      autocomplete="new-password"
    />

    <label for="age">Age</label>
    <input type="number" id="age" name="age" min="18" max="120" />

    <label>
      <input type="checkbox" name="terms" required />
      I agree to the terms
    </label>

    <button type="submit">Create account</button>
  </fieldset>
</form>
